title: Enchant.cz
description: A lightweight modpack for Enchant.cz based on Fabulously Optimized that boosts performance and adds subtle QoL features while preserving vanilla.
body:
Lightweight, performance-first modpack tailored for the [Enchant.cz](https://enchant.cz) whitelisted vanilla server — built on [Fabulously Optimized](https://download.fo) and packed with small, useful quality-of-life additions. Designed to keep gameplay smooth, compatible with OptiFine features, and to enhance day-to-day play without changing the vanilla feel.

---

## What it offers
- **High performance** ⚡ — Includes modern optimization mods (Sodium, Lithium, etc.) to make gameplay as smooth and responsive as possible.  
- **OptiFine features** 🎨 — Supports shaders, advanced resource packs, zoom, and other OptiFine-style enhancements through the Fabulously Optimized foundation.  
- **Useful quality-of-life tools** 🧰 — Inventory sorting, convenient chest interactions, and other small mods that streamline gameplay without breaking immersion.  
- **Server-ready** 🏰 — Specifically tuned for the Enchant.cz whitelisted vanilla server experience.

---

## Included mods
- **Fabulously Optimized** (core performance & OptiFine support) 🔧
- **Shulker Box Tooltip** (see contents of shulker boxes in inventory) 📦
- **Simple Voice Chat** (in-game proximity voice) 🎙️
- **AppleSkin** (food/hunger HUD info) 🍎
- **Inventory Profiles Next** (sorting and inventory layouts) 🔀
- **Dynamic Fullbright** (toggleable brighter lighting) 💡
- **ViaFabricPlus** (protocol compatibility for different client versions) 🔁
- *and more...*

---

Jump into Enchant.cz and enjoy a smoother, more convenient Minecraft experience — crafted to keep things lightweight and vanilla-friendly. ✨
